title: L&T Infotech is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: L&T Infotech is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech:
L&T Infotech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech!
